content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 1, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 1, 2026, focused on enhancing agentic coding capabilities, improving cloud infrastructure stability, and refining the agent runtime. Key achievements include the launch of a Claude-Code-style orchestrator workbench, the introduction of keyless web-fetch actions for non-Anthropic models, and significant CI/CD and cloud-deployment optimizations.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

*   **Agentic Orchestration & Coding Workbench**
    *   Launched the `/orchestrator` coding workbench, achieving parity with Claude-Code/Codex-style workflows using the opencode + Cerebras backend ([#8095](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8095)).
    *   Improved error handling for ACP requests by preserving JSON-RPC `error.data` fields ([#8098](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8098)).
*   **Runtime & Web-Fetch Enhancements**
    *   Implemented a keyless `WEB_FETCH` action, enabling non-Anthropic models to perform live information retrieval inline ([#8097](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8097)).
    *   Added configuration support for the `run-node` entry filename via `ELIZA_ENTRY_FILE` ([#8126](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8126)).
    *   Moved `plugin-google` and `plugin-lifeops` to optional status to ensure default image boot stability ([#8105](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8105)).
*   **Cloud & Infrastructure Stability**
    *   Fixed native Cloud agent sandbox routing and startup issues ([#8104](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8104)).
    *   Optimized CI/CD workflows, including environment-specific deployment triggers and submodule guards ([#8114](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8114), [#8115](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8115), [#8102](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8102)).
    *   Fixed Windows installer naming for whitelabeling ([#8103](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8103)) and resolved PGlite lock self-healing issues ([#8092](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8092)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Core & Security:** [#8140](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8140), [#8135](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8135), [#8129](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8129), [#8123](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8123), [#8113](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8113), [#8106](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8106).
*   **Orchestrator & Cloud:** [#8139](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8139), [#8133](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8133), [#8128](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8128), [#8112](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8112), [#8107](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8107).
*   **General Fixes & Features:** [#8138](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8138), [#8137](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8137), [#8134](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8134), [#8132](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8132), [#8131](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8131), [#8130](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8130), [#8119](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8119), [#8111](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8111), [#8110](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8110), [#8109](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8109).
*   **Maintenance:** [#8118](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8118).

## CLOSED ISSUES

*   **Runtime & Tooling Fixes:** Resolved build breaks in `develop` ([#8099](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8099)), enabled keyless web-search for non-Anthropic models ([#8100](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8100)), and fixed diagnostic data loss in ACP errors ([#8101](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8101)).
*   **Orchestrator & Planner:** Addressed issues with planner meta-narration ([#7960](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7960)), workbench UI parity ([#8136](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8136)), and superseded planner routing for `WEB_FETCH` ([#8108](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8108)).

## NEW ISSUES

*   **Orchestrator & Live-Info:** Issues regarding false-positive stale build flags ([#8127](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8127)) and the need for improved coding-agent UI parity ([#8136](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8136)).
*   **General:** Discussion on the effectiveness of Eliza for coding tasks ([#8124](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8124)) and regressions in `WEB_FETCH` planner routing ([#8122](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8122)).

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   *No active issues with more than 3 comments were identified for this reporting period.*
